key.name: smoothing-factor
key.description: Sensor response speed: 0=instant, 0.95=slowest (most noise-resistant). Controls how many poll cycles brightness takes to follow a lux change.

key.name: max-lux
key.description: Reference ambient light level at or above which maximum brightness is applied (100% of brightness range, 100-100000)

key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often to check sensor in milliseconds (100-60000)

key.name: lux-change-threshold
key.description: Minimum lux change required before recalculating brightness (0-50)

key.name: min-brightness-delta
key.description: Minimum brightness percentage change required before applying a new value (1-10)

key.name: min-lux
key.description: Reference ambient light level at or below which minimum brightness is applied (0% of brightness range, can be set manually or updated by calibration)

key.name: sensor-path
key.description: Manual IIO device path; empty = auto-detect

key.name: show-label
key.description: Controls the visibility and content of the panel applet

key.name: label-display-mode
key.description: Which live value to show in the panel label: brightness, lux, or brightness_lux

key.name: response-curve
key.description: Mathematical curve type to map lux to brightness

key.name: manual-debounce-window
key.description: Seconds to wait before resuming adaptive brightness after a manual change (5-120)

key.name: schedule-enabled
key.description: Whether the daily off-period schedule is active

key.name: schedule-off-start
key.description: JSON time object for when to disable the applet each day

key.name: schedule-off-end
key.description: JSON time object for when to re-enable the applet each day
